goal: 补全遗留的两个 Hook 脚本：1) file-lock-check.sh（pre_task 文件锁检查）；2) entropy-cleanup.sh（post_task 熵治理清理）。完成后从 contract-mechanism.md 移除(未实现)标注

coverage_checklist.file_lock_script: assert: file-lock-check.sh 扫描所有 active 合同的 files_to_modify 检查文件重叠
coverage_checklist.file_lock_block: assert: file-lock-check.sh 发现重叠时输出 RESULT: BLOCK (exit 1)
coverage_checklist.entropy_script: assert: entropy-cleanup.sh 清理 tmp/ 目录临时文件、过期追踪记录、空目录
coverage_checklist.entropy_warn: assert: entropy-cleanup.sh 输出 RESULT: WARN 时带清理统计
coverage_checklist.annotations_removed: assert: contract-mechanism.md 中 file-lock-check 和 entropy-cleanup 的(未实现)标注已移除
